Package org.eventb.ui.eventbeditor

Interface IEventBEditor<R extends IInternalElement>

Type Parameters:
R - This specifies the "input type" of the editor, e.g. IMachineRoot or IContextRoot.
All Superinterfaces:
org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, org.eclipse.ui.IEditorPart, org.eclipse.ui.ide.IGotoMarker, org.eclipse.ui.ISaveablePart, org.eclipse.ui.IWorkbenchPart
All Known Implementing Classes:
EventBContextEditor, EventBEditor, EventBMachineEditor
public interface IEventBEditor<R extends IInternalElement> extends org.eclipse.ui.IEditorPart, org.eclipse.ui.ide.IGotoMarker
Since:
1.0

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from interface org.eclipse.ui.IEditorPart

    PROP_DIRTY, PROP_INPUT

    Fields inherited from interface org.eclipse.ui.IWorkbenchPart

    PROP_TITLE

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addElementChangedListener(IElementChangedListener listener)
    Add a new element changed listener.
    void
    addNewElement(IRodinElement element)
    Add an element to be new.
    void
    addStatusListener(IStatusChangedListener listener)
    Add a new status changed listener.
    String
    getEditorId()
    Return the string ID for this editor.
    FormulaFactory
    getFormulaFactory()
    Deprecated.
    the underlying method is deprecated and this method was not actually needed by the UI; if the formula factory is needed at some point, it can typically be obtained through getRodinInput() and IEventBRoot.getSafeFormulaFactory()
    R
    getRodinInput()
    Returns the Rodin file associated with this editor.
    boolean
    isNewElement(IRodinElement element)
    Check if an element is new (unsaved).
    void
    removeElementChangedListener(IElementChangedListener listener)
    Remove an element changed listener.
    void
    removeStatusListener(IStatusChangedListener listener)
    Remove a status changed listener.

  • Method Details

    • addNewElement

      void addNewElement(IRodinElement element)
      Add an element to be new.

      Parameters:
      element - a Rodin element

    • addStatusListener

      Parameters:
      listener - a status changed listener

      void removeStatusListener(IStatusChangedListener listener)
      Remove a status changed listener.

      Parameters:
      listener - a status changed listener
      Since:

    • isNewElement

      boolean isNewElement(IRodinElement element)
      Check if an element is new (unsaved).

      Parameters:
      element - a Rodin element
      Returns:
      true if the element is new (unsaved)

    • addElementChangedListener

      void addElementChangedListener(IElementChangedListener listener)
      Add a new element changed listener.

      Parameters:
      listener - an element changed listener

    • removeElementChangedListener

      void removeElementChangedListener(IElementChangedListener listener)
      Remove an element changed listener.

      Parameters:
      listener - an element changed listener

    • getRodinInput

      R getRodinInput()
      Returns the Rodin file associated with this editor. Can return null if the the editor has NOT been initialized.
      Returns:
      the Rodin file (IEventBFile) associated with this editor

    • getEditorId

      String getEditorId()
      Return the string ID for this editor.

      Returns:
      the unique string ID for the editor.

    • getFormulaFactory

      @Deprecated FormulaFactory getFormulaFactory()
      Deprecated.
      the underlying method is deprecated and this method was not actually needed by the UI; if the formula factory is needed at some point, it can typically be obtained through getRodinInput() and IEventBRoot.getSafeFormulaFactory()
      Returns the formula factory used by the root input of this editor.
      Returns:
      the formula factory used
      Since:
      2.0
